headline: Uber nears €12.5bn deal to acquire Delivery Hero, FT reports
summary: Uber is set to take over Delivery Hero in a deal valuing the German food ‌delivery company at about €12.5 billion ($14.34 billion), the Financial ‌Times reported on Wednesday.  Delivery Hero confirmed it was in advanced negotiations with Uber ​regarding a potential takeover offer on Tuesday.  • Acquiring Delivery Hero, which has a market value of roughly €11.6 billion, would expand the Uber Eats ‌food-delivery network in ⁠Europe, the Middle East, Asia and Latin America.

headline: Can Uber Technologies (UBER) Stay Cheap While Automation Risks Grow?
summary: Uber Technologies stock has delivered a 55.6% gain over the past 5 years, yet recent weakness and a strong value score suggest the market may not be fully crediting its current fundamentals. For investors watching the debate around autonomous vehicles, food delivery consolidation and regulatory pushback, the key question is whether today’s price fairly reflects those cross currents. Over 5 years, Uber Technologies has returned 55.6%, which points to meaningful long term share price progress...

headline: Lucid Rises 18% as EV Maker Denies Bankruptcy Claims, Analyst Assures Sufficient Funding
summary: Lucid stock cratered 50% before staging a dramatic intraday reversal, but with a 31% Polymarket bankruptcy probability still lingering after the denial, traders are left wondering whether Wednesday's relief rally is a genuine turning point or just a dead cat bounce.

headline: 'Uber Nears €12.5 Billion Deal To Acquire Delivery Hero; Delivery Hero Is Expected To Announce The Deal As Early As Thursday With Uber Paying Roughly €41 Per Share; Deal Will Split Delivery Hero, With The Group Selling Its Turkish Arm Yemeksepeti Alongside Multiple European Businesses To An Investment Firm' - Financial Times

headline: GameStop expands on-demand delivery through Uber Eats partnership (GME)
summary: GameStop (NYSE:GME) has partnered with Uber Technologies (NYSE:UBER) to make its products available through the Uber Eats platform, giving customers across the United States access to on-demand and scheduled delivery of gaming products. Gaming products available through Uber EatsUnder the new agreement, customers can order a wide range of GameStop merchandise, including video games, gaming consoles, accessories and collectibles, directly through the Uber Eats app.

headline: Need A Gaming Console Fast? GameStop Is Now Delivering Through Uber Eats

headline: GameStop Joins Uber Eats to Deliver Video Games, Collectibles, and Electronics to Customers Nationwide
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, July 15, 2026--Uber Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: UBER) and GameStop (NYSE: GME) today announced a new partnership that brings one of the largest gaming retailers to the Uber Eats marketplace. Customers can now order video games, gaming consoles, accessories, collectibles, and more from GameStop locations nationwide on Uber Eats for scheduled or on-demand delivery.

headline: 3 Quality Compounders to Keep an Eye On
summary: Quality compounders are well-oiled machines. Their competitive advantages allow them to make profits consistently and reinvest them into projects that generate even more profits, creating a virtuous cycle of returns.
